scope: offline static parity; electrical GPIO, pinctrl and runtime sysfs behavior are excluded

comparisons.surface: ELF, modinfo, KMI and reproducible build

comparisons.evidence: stage3_assembly_comparison.json records 17/19 strict exact functions and 18/19 instruction-exact functions
380 instructions, 74 blocks, 111 edges and 66 ordered calls are exact
17 blocks, 23 edges and ordered calls match; candidate has 63 versus 61 instructions
stage3 complete harness passes 50/50 over all 19 modeled functions

blockers: two nominal KCFI signatures remain unresolved
hml_config_version_show has byte-equivalent but non-unique anonymous rodata identity
independent review and controlled hardware validation are pending
